title: Bare Bones Classic Ore Outline
description: Make the boring new ores to a old one but with an outline
body:
ABOUT:
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
A texturepack that changes the textures of the ores to the old/classic one but with outlines!
![example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4340a83092ef53110ff872b561f8e597e2f876d6.png)
